title: DealerInformation
description: Public dealership profile. v0.2 reduces this to the minimum: a dealer group `name`, an optional `welcome_message`, and one or more `rooftops` (physical locations). Per-location identity, address, geo, contacts, hours, and service capabilities live on each rooftop. Vehicles reference the rooftop that holds them via `Vehicle.rooftop` = the rooftop's `name`. Returned by the `dealer.information` AAP skill, wrapped in `dealer.information.response` and carried inside an A2A `Message.parts[].data` DataPart via the `SendMessage` operation.

name.description: Dealer group / business name shown to buyers (e.g. 'Demo Auto Group').

welcome_message.description: Optional greeting a buyer agent MAY surface to the user (e.g. 'Welcome to Demo Auto Group — happy to help by phone, video, or in person.').

rooftops.description: One or more dealership locations (rooftops). A single-location dealer has one entry; a multi-rooftop group lists each store.

named_value.description: A labeled contact value (e.g. name 'Sales', value '+14155550100' or 'sales@dealer.example').

value.description: The contact value itself — the email address or phone number.

day_hours.description: A single day's hours — {open, close} in 24h HH:MM (rooftop local time) or null when closed.

weekly_hours.description: Hours keyed by day. Each day is {open, close} or null when closed.

schedule.description: A named weekly schedule (e.g. name 'sales' or 'service' with its own weekly hours).

name.description: Rooftop name shown to buyers and referenced by `Vehicle.rooftop` (e.g. 'Demo Toyota San Francisco').

legal_name.description: Legal / registered business name for this location.

emails.description: Email contact channels for this rooftop.

phones.description: Phone contact channels for this rooftop.

schedules.description: Named weekly schedules for this rooftop (e.g. a 'sales' schedule and a 'service' schedule).

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier for this rooftop's schedules (e.g. 'America/Los_Angeles').

capabilities.description: Services this rooftop offers, as free-text tags (e.g. 'sales', 'service', 'parts', 'financing', 'trade_in', 'delivery').
